result.name: A tisket a tasket
result.description: Level: 1d6 Form: Woven yellow basket with wooden handles Effect: This basket can contain up to one cypher per artifact level, as long as each is no larger than a typical cat. Cyphers in the basket do not count against a character’s limit. Depletion: 1 in 1d20 (check each time a cypher is added to the basket)

sections.name: A tisket a tasket
sections.effect:
Level: 1d6

Form: Woven yellow basket with wooden handles

Effect: This basket can contain up to one cypher per artifact level, as long as each is no larger than a typical cat. Cyphers in the basket do not count against a character’s limit.

Depletion: 1 in 1d20 (check each time a cypher is added to the basket)
